title: Automatically set a value when creating ellement are in a group
excerpt:
Lets say we have a table view with items grouped-by state. (TODO, WIP, DONE) 
When we create a new item when clicking on the last row of a group, the item should automatically be assigned to that group.

posts.author: Nicolas.G (Nicolas Goyon)
